name: Resolvin D1
summary: Endogenous DHA-derived specialized pro-resolving lipid mediator tested in aged-animal inflammation-resolution and muscle-injury models.
mechanism_summary: Activates inflammation-resolution programs through pro-resolving lipid signaling, including macrophage efferocytosis, reduced inflammatory cytokine expression, and repair-associated remodeling in aged injury models.

open_questions: Whether RvD1 delivery can be made durable, targeted, and safe enough for older humans
Whether aged-animal repair benefits translate beyond acute injury models
Whether RvD1 can improve regeneration rather than only reducing maladaptive inflammation and fibrosis
